Headline: Trains bypassing Pulaski/Congress Station
ShortDescription: Blue Line trains, in both directions, are still running, but are not stopping at Pulaski/Congress due to a loss of power.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line trains, in both directions, are still running, but are not stopping at Pulaski/Congress due to a loss of power.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines. These may include: #53 Pulaski buses.

  • As a result of the delay, shuttle buses are available to provide connecting service from Kedzie-Homan to Cicero/Congress, in both directions.

We apologize for this inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.

Headline: #34 South Michigan Temporary Reroute at Michigan/114th
ShortDescription: #34 South Michigan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Michigan, 115th, State, 119th & Michigan due to localized flooding near Michigan/114th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#34 South Michigan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Michigan, 115th, State, 119th and Michigan, then will resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to localized flooding near Michigan/114th.
